events.fact: Character 'Conrad' created and world 'Terra Conrad' generated.
Player arrives in the Meadows biome via Valkyrie.
Discovered the Vegvisir runestone for Eikthyr, the first boss.
First combat encounter; killed a boar and gathered leather scraps.
Discovered flint along the water's edge.
Discovery: Birch trees (Iron-Bark) cannot be harvested with a stone axe.
Crafted a hammer, unlocking the building menu.
Discovered an abandoned structure containing a beehive.
Built a workbench, unlocking advanced crafting and building recipes.
Commenced construction of the first shelter (Othala).
Set spawn point after enclosing the shelter with a roof.
Slept through the first night and acquired the Rested buff.
